must_detect.matched_text:
+82-02-555-1100; Data Protection Officer: Mr. Joon‑hyuk Baek.
Cluster example: Ms. Yuna Seok (IR associate, OKL Seoul Campus, Mapo‑gu), DOB 1991-05-14 (33), intranet account y.seok@okl-kr.example, device gxy-s23-9b2c, private IP 10.24.16.3, session KCX-ir-2024-04-18-Δ17.
Her HR profile ID E-OKL-11877 and payroll wallet acct okl.payroll://11877 are used for compliance; re s i d e n t reg no is stored only as a salted hash “RRN 91*****-2******” and never in clear text.
We may collect quasi-identifiers such as district (Mapo), device model, and job function; alone these do not identify you, e.g., “female, 30s, lives in Gyeonggi” should not be treated as a direct identifier.
separate weak identifiers: 1984-09-xx; dev laptop “lnv-x13-77a”; office code “Busan-Branch-2” — none linked to any natural person here.
For MNPI under FSCMA, undisclosed deal term sheets from our KCX PIPE project “jade-sparrow” are access‑logged and embargoed until public notice; nothing in this page is MNPI.
Vendor processing: Daejin Orbit Data LLC (processor) and PineShell Cloud KR (sub‑processor) operate under our DPA; cross‑border transfer uses SCC‑equivalents to JP and SG with retention ≤ 5 years.
Access rights: submit DSAR to dsar@okl-kr.example or http://portal.okl.kr/sso?k=a7c9&id=emp-11877 (requires SSO), or mail to OKL Privacy Office, 17-9, Nonhyeon‑ro 77‑gil, Seoul (fictional).
We do not capture precise GPS unless you enable it; log data may include pseudonymous cookie “okl_sess=se0-77- 9b” and a device fingerprint that is not a MAC address aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff.
Resident‑number collection is minimized; forms may show OCR‑like masking such as 7 3 1 2 1 2 - 1 * * * * * *, which is hashed server‑side; do not email such numbers.
Retention workflow: IR call recordings kept 12 months; HR tax documents kept 10 years; device telemetry 180 days; deletion verified by ticket cm-kr/ret-2024-0917 and quarterly reports to FSC and FSS.
this paragraph is routine product-support prose about the “CloudWharf” scheduler and should not imply identity, nor is it investment advice; team please update jira by friday.
Data sources include resumes, public-source investor Q&A, and K C X notice archives; public-source aggregation does not convert information into MNPI.
If a breach is suspected, contact Mr. Baek at jh.baek@okl-kr.example
